name_cn:
【Elephant Rose Red❌ Large】
Dior book tote shopping bag
Inspired by Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, this Book Tote is a flagship piece embodying Dior's aesthetic. It can hold various daily essentials, featuring a fresh interpretation of the Bayadere pattern mixed with D-Stripes embroidery, adding a touch of fashion. The front is adorned with the "Christian Dior" logo, fully reflecting Dior's exquisite craftsmanship.
Style No.: 1286
Size: 42×35×18.5cm
